'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 114''' is the one hundred fourteenth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[March 3]], [[2004]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*[[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]
*[[Anakin Solo]]
*[[Malakili/Legends|Malakili]]
*[[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - Wildlife
*[[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Battle droid/Legends|Droids]]
*[[Ithullan ore hauler|Ithullian ore hauler]]
